proven.claim: PROVEN: At line 147, dryRun is true AND issue.title was not in seen set
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 147
; PROVEN: At line 147, dryRun is true AND issue.title was not in seen set
(declare-const dry_run Int)
(declare-const title_in_seen Int)
; Code transition: seen.has(issue.title) returned false — loop body was not skipped
(assert (= title_in_seen 0))
; Code transition: if (dryRun) branch was entered — this is the dry-run path
(assert (= dry_run 1))
; Negation: either dryRun is false OR title was already in seen
(assert (or (= dry_run 0) (= title_in_seen 1)))
(check-sat)
